ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "storage_size" TEXT /* Storage size of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "low_value" TEXT /* Lowest value the data type can represent */,
  "high_value" TEXT /* Highest value the data type can represent */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or precision of the data type */,
  "timezone_support" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data type supports time zones */,
  "resolution_unit" TEXT /* Unit of resolution (e.g., microseconds, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type used for the transaction time */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction, including time zone */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Audit-related information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type used for the record date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical record */,
  "record_value" TEXT /* Value of the historical record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical record */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the historical record */,
  "record_location" TEXT /* Location where the historical record was generated */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Audit-related information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-series data point */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type used for the data time */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point, including time zone */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_metric" TEXT /* Metric or measurement associated with the data point */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time-series data point */,
  "data_location" TEXT /* Location where the data point was generated */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Audit-related information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integrity check */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the check applies to */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the data integrity check */,
  "check_rule" TEXT /* Rule or condition of the data integrity check */,
  "last_run_date" TEXT /* Date and time the check was last run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the last run (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the check */,
  "next_run_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time for the next run of the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event, including time zone */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed (transaction, historical record, time-series data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the access attempt (e.g., 200 for success, 403 for forbidden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES historical_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
